basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Various qualifications including BNYS degree, Bachelor/Master in Yoga, PG Diploma in Yoga, or Yoga Certification Board certificate, with experience.
qualification.details: Yoga Instructor (Male) & Yoga Instructor (Female): Five and a half year course leading to Bachelor of Naturopathy and Yogic Science (BNYS) degree B.A. (Yoga) three year degree holder / B.Sc. (Yoga) three year degree holder / M.Sc. (Yoga) / M.A. (Yoga) degree holder PG Diploma (minimum one year course) Diploma holder Yoga Wellness Instructor Certificate Holder Experience: 1 year (for BNYS, Yoga Certification Board), 2 years (for PG Diploma)

salary_details.pay_scale: Male: Rs. 8,000/- per month, Female: Rs. 5,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gonda District Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: gonda.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Gonda District Yoga Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Gonda District Yoga Instructor posts is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Yoga Instructor posts?
faq.answer: Eligibility includes a BNYS degree, Bachelor/Master in Yoga, PG Diploma in Yoga, or a Yoga Certification Board certificate. Specific experience requirements vary based on the qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Gonda District Yoga Instructor positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years for all candidates applying for the Yoga Instructor posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Yoga Instructors in Gonda District?
faq.answer: Male Yoga Instructors will receive Rs. 8,000/- per month, while Female Yoga Instructors will receive Rs. 5,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Yoga Instructors?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Yoga Instructor posts in Gonda District, with 2 for male and 3 for female candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Gonda District Yoga Instructor recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Yoga Instructor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Yoga Instructor positions will be based on an interview (साक्षात्कार).

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Gonda District, which is gonda.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach self-attested photocopies of all educational and experience certificates, along with two self-addressed envelopes with postage stamps.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
